name: ADA Geochemistry Building Blocks repository
abstract:
Building blocks for Astromat Data Archive (ADA) geochemistry metadata profiles,
using the OGC Building Blocks pattern.
description:
Modular schema components for ADA analytical technique metadata. Imports shared
schema.org and CDIF property building blocks from the CDIF Building Blocks repository.

bblocks.name: String Array Type
bblocks.abstract: Simple reusable array of strings used throughout ADA metadata. Defines type: array of strings.

bblocks.name: Creative Work Type
bblocks.abstract: Shell type for labeled links to creative works (schema:CreativeWork). Defines properties: @type, schema:name, schema:description, schema:url.

bblocks.name: L2MS Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: Laser-2 Mass Spectrometry cube data with ionization parameters. Defines properties: @type, sampleName, ionizationTimeDelay, massGate, photoionizationWavelength, plasmaShutter, timeDelayUnits, wavelengthUnits.

bblocks.name: ARGT Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: ARGT (Argon) document type with phase and isotope analysis. Defines properties: @type, phaseAnalyzed, isotopeType.

bblocks.name: Basemap Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: Basemap images with RGB channels and pixel scaling. Defines properties: @type, schema:description, pixelUnits, pixelScaleX, pixelScaleY, channel1, channel2, channel3.

bblocks.name: DSC Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: Differential Scanning Calorimetry heat tabular data. Defines properties: @type, analysisType.

bblocks.name: EA-IRMS Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: Elemental Analysis Isotope Ratio Mass Spectrometry collection. Defines properties: @type, massConsumed, elementType.

bblocks.name: EMPA Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: Electron Microprobe Analysis instrument-specific detail properties. Defines properties: @type, spectrometersUsed, signalUsed.

bblocks.name: ICP-OES Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: Inductively Coupled Plasma Optical Emission Spectrometry detail properties. Defines properties: @type, mass, dissolutionFactor.

bblocks.name: LAF Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: Laser Ablation Fluorescence processed/raw data detail properties. Defines properties: @type, elementAnalyzed, sampleMassConsumed, sampleType.

bblocks.name: QRIS Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: QRIS (Raman) with calibration and illumination parameters. Defines properties: @type, calibrationFile, pipelineVersion, focalLength, illuminationColor, illuminationLevel, exposureTime, target.

bblocks.name: SLS Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: Structured Light Scanning shape models and partial scans. Defines properties: @type, countScans, facets, unitsOfMeasurement, version, vertices, watertight.

bblocks.name: VNMIR Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: Very-Near Mid-IR spectroscopy with detailed measurement parameters. Defines properties: @type, detector, beamsplitter, calibrationStandards, comments, numberOfScans, eMaxFitRegionMax, eMaxFitRegionMin, emissionAngle, emissivityMaximum, environmentalPressure, incidenceAngle, measurement, measurementEnvironment, phaseAngle, sampleHeated, samplePreparation, sampleTemperature, spectralRangeMax, spectralRangeMin, spectralResolution, spectralSampling, spotSize, uncertaintyNoise, vacuumExposedSample.

bblocks.name: XCT Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: X-ray Computed Tomography images with detailed scan parameters. Defines properties: @type, beamFilterMaterial, beamFilterThickness, dataRangeLower, dataRangeUpper, detectorGain, detectorBinning, detectorSize, detectorType, imageExposure, imageFPS, imageGain, imageSize, instrumentType, nsiBeamHardening, numberOfFramesAveragedPerProjection, numberOfProjections, numberOfSlices, pixelPitch, reconstructedDataFormat, reconstructedVoxelSize, reconstructionSoftware, rotationAngle, rotationType, sourceToDetectorDistance, sourceToObjectDistance, subPixGrid, subPixShift, xraySource, xrayTargetMaterial, xrayTubeCurrent, xrayTubeEnergy, xrayTubePower.

bblocks.name: XRD Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: X-ray Diffraction tabular data with geometry and wavelength. Defines properties: @type, geometry, sampleMount, stepSize, timePerStep, wavelength.

bblocks.name: Image Type
bblocks.abstract: ADA image with componentType classification for analytical images. Defines properties: @type, acquisitionTime, componentType, channel1, channel2, channel3, pixelSize, illuminationType, imageType.

bblocks.name: Supplemental Document Image Type
bblocks.abstract: Supplemental document images including analysis locations and context photos. Defines properties: @type, componentType, numPixelsX, numPixelsY, _original_name.

bblocks.name: Spatial Registration Type
bblocks.abstract: Pixel coordinate system registration for images and maps. Defines properties: basemap, originX, originY, originZ, coordDef, coordUnits, pixelUnits, pixelScaleX, pixelScaleY, originLocation.

bblocks.name: Analysis Instrument Type
bblocks.abstract: Analytical instrument definition combining NXinstrument and prov:Entity. Defines properties: @type, schema:additionalType, schema:name, schema:description, schema:identifier.

bblocks.name: Analysis Laboratory Type
bblocks.abstract: Laboratory/facility definition combining NXsource and schema:Place. Defines properties: @type, schema:identifier, schema:name, schema:alternateName.

bblocks.name: Collection Type
bblocks.abstract: Set of related files with identical information models or composite datasets. Defines properties: @type, componentType, memberTypes, nFiles, filelist. Uses building blocks: stringArray (adaProperties).

bblocks.name: NanoIR Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: Nano-IR spectroscopy collections with phase analysis. Defines properties: @type, phaseAnalyzed. Uses building blocks: stringArray (adaProperties).

bblocks.name: NanoSIMS Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: Nano Secondary Ion Mass Spectrometry with isotope tracking. Defines properties: @type, phaseAnalyzed, isotopeAnalyzed. Uses building blocks: stringArray (adaProperties).

bblocks.name: PSFD Instrument Detail
bblocks.abstract: Point Spread Function Data with image names and conditions. Defines properties: @type, imageName, imageViewingConditions. Uses building blocks: stringArray (adaProperties).

bblocks.name: Document Type
bblocks.abstract: Supplemental documents for calibration, methods, and analysis info. Defines properties: @type, componentType, schema:version, schema:isBasedOn. Uses building blocks: detailARGT (adaProperties).

bblocks.name: Other File Type
bblocks.abstract: Non-standard file formats approved for ADA submission. Defines properties: @type, componentType, schema:encodingFormat, formatDescription. Uses building blocks: detailSLS (adaProperties).

bblocks.name: Image Map Type
bblocks.abstract: Spatially registered image map with pixel coordinates and component types. Defines properties: @type, acquisitionTime, componentType, channel1, channel2, channel3, illuminationType, imageType, numPixelsX, numPixelsY, spatialRegistration. Uses building blocks: detailEMPA (adaProperties), spatialRegistration (adaProperties).

bblocks.name: Data Cube Type
bblocks.abstract: CDI DimensionalDataStructure for multidimensional data. Defines properties: @type, componentType, dataComponentResource. Uses building blocks: detailL2MS (adaProperties), cdifDataCube (cdifProperties).

bblocks.name: Instrument Detail Types
bblocks.abstract: Instrument-specific detail types for ADA analytical techniques. Defines types: detailBasemap, detailARGT, detailDSC, detailEMPA, detailEAIRMS, detailICPOES, detailL2MS, detailLAF, detailNanoIR, detailNanoSIMS, detailPSFD, detailVNMIR, detailQRIS, detailSLS, detailXCT, detailXRD. Uses building blocks: detailBasemap (adaProperties), detailARGT (adaProperties), detailDSC (adaProperties), detailEMPA (adaProperties), detailEAIRMS (adaProperties), detailICPOES (adaProperties), detailL2MS (adaProperties), detailLAF (adaProperties), detailNanoIR (adaProperties), detailNanoSIMS (adaProperties), detailPSFD (adaProperties), detailVNMIR (adaProperties), detailQRIS (adaProperties), detailSLS (adaProperties), detailXCT (adaProperties), detailXRD (adaProperties).

bblocks.name: Tabular Data Type
bblocks.abstract: CDI PhysicalDataSet for tabular/structured data files. Defines properties: @type, componentType, xCoordCol, yCoordCol, zCoordCol, coordUnits, spatialRegistration. Uses building blocks: detailDSC (adaProperties), detailEAIRMS (adaProperties), detailEMPA (adaProperties), detailLAF (adaProperties), detailNanoSIMS (adaProperties), detailNanoIR (adaProperties), detailPSFD (adaProperties), detailVNMIR (adaProperties), detailXRD (adaProperties), spatialRegistration (adaProperties), cdifTabularData (cdifProperties).

bblocks.name: Files Type
bblocks.abstract: DataDownload with checksum, size, encoding format, and file detail. Defines properties: schema:additionalType, schema:description, schema:size, resultTarget, schema:relatedLink. Uses building blocks: dataDownload (schemaorgProperties), stringArray (adaProperties), image (adaProperties), imageMap (adaProperties), tabularData (adaProperties), collection (adaProperties), dataCube (adaProperties), document (adaProperties), supDocImage (adaProperties), otherFile (adaProperties).

bblocks.name: ADA Product Profile
bblocks.abstract: Top-level ADA product metadata profile composing all ADA building blocks
